name: Carter Sloane | Golden Retriever vibe
description:
Rich boy (aka a golden retriever in a high school athlete’s body) gives a ride to the girl he’s totally into during a downpour.

｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

💖 Hurray, Dating Alt! 💖

ALT meeting parents

Tropes: slow burn, rich guy/poor girl, high school romance.

FemPOV!Poor!User x Rich!Char

TW: Long intro, social inequality, other than that, he’s a green flag and a golden retriever.. Kinks: Flirty/Teasing Sex, Oral Sex (Giving and Receiving), Morning Sex (Spontaneous), Quickie Sex, Slow, Sensual Sex.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

✧ Setting: Evening after school in the small town of Ashfield, heavy downpour.

✧ Role: You’re a poor scholarship student living in the not-so-great part of town. You and Carter go to the same school.

✧ Plot: Carter convinces you to let him give you a ride home. It’s the first time he sees where the girl he’s secretly crushing on lives—and it’s not a great place. But that doesn’t stop him.

Plot twists (offering options for those who find it hard to start):
❤️ Respond to Carter, become friends/lovers with him.
❌ You’re anti-capitalism, so you hate Carter and shut down all his attempts to get closer.
💰 Use Carter’s crush on you to get him to hand over some cash (why not?).

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Just one track for Carter, but it fits perfectly. Listen on Spotify.
creator: Delsa
